description: A patient has had an adverse reaction to a medication. The physician needs to discontinue the order immediately.

nodes.task_description: Verify clinician access and patient identity.
Open the patient's chart and view their active orders.

expected_outcome.expected: Physician finds the list of current medication orders.

nodes.task_description: Select the medication order that needs to be stopped.

expected_outcome.expected: Physician correctly identifies the medication causing the reaction.

nodes.task_description: Select the 'Discontinue' action, provide a reason ('Adverse reaction'), and sign the order.

expected_outcome.expected: The order is immediately inactivated on the MAR and in the pharmacy system.
